name: Supernatural
description:
✧˖*°࿐|Play in the world of supernatural, hunt alongside Sam, Dean and Cass, or maybe even have a villain arc with Crowley! Create your own story and have fun!

~Hiya! Thank you for using my third bot! Please leave a review, any feedback is appreciated and helps me to improve my bots! If you want to request a bot, here is the bot request form! For more of my bots, check out my bot index!

CW: -ᴛʜɪꜱ ʙᴏᴛ, ᴀʟᴛʜᴏᴜɢʜ ᴜɴɪɴᴛᴇɴᴛɪᴏɴᴀʟ, ᴍᴀʏ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ꜱᴏᴍᴇ ᴛʀɪɢɢᴇʀɪɴɢ ᴀɴᴅ ᴅᴀʀᴋ ᴛʜᴇᴍᴇꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ʟɪᴍɪᴛᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ʙᴜᴛ ɪɴᴄʟᴜᴅɪɴɢ ᴠɪᴏʟᴇɴᴄᴇ.

ᴛᴀɢꜱ: Dean Winchester, Supernatural, SPN, Sam Winchester, Castiel, Castiel Novak, Lucifer, Crowley, Rowena, Witches, Ghosts, Monsters, Jensen Ackles, Monster, Witch, Horror, Demon, Angel.
creator: Hello Kitty!
